chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.3017 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application ----------------------------------------------------- 10.03.2025 Mr. Ajab Khan Khattak, advocate for applicant Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh Complainant present ------------------------------------ Applicant/accused Shabbir Hussain Shams seeks pre- arrest bail in FIR No.387/2023 of P.S. Aram Bagh Karachi for offence under section 489-F, PPC. Counsel for applicant out rightly submits that alleged offence is compoundable and parties have settled their dispute outside the Court. Complainant is present in person and admits that he has settled the dispute with applicant/accused outside the Court and has recorded his no objection for confirmation of bail to applicant. Since the offence alleged is compoundable and the parties have settled their dispute outside the Court, the complainant is in attendance before this Court and has recorded his no objection, as such, interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicant/accused above named by this Court vide order dated 31.12.2024 is hereby confirmed on the same terms and conditions. The instant criminal bail application is accordingly disposed of. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
